recommendation, exception, approval-needed, and audit evidence requirements

authorization, referral, eligibility, order, documentation, discharge, transition, post-acute placement, coding, claim, denial, appeal, privacy, and access dependencies

authority completeness signals

notes: Declared abilities cover all shared abilities, all planning-scheduling-and-allocation abilities, and all healthcare-and-care-delivery abilities.
Every scenario in evaluation/results.json is represented in scenario_coverage.
Ability mapping emphasizes schedule, capacity, allocation, approval, clinical, payer, privacy, evidence, and escalation boundaries.
